experiment: F-SWARMER2 GAP-5 Phase 2: daughter validation viability
hypothesis: Daughter genesis bundle should pass validate_beliefs.py --quick and orient.py without errors
expect: Daughter passes validation (0 FAIL). Before fix: 13 FAIL errors (type parsing breaks on 'inherited (parent observed)').

method.description: 1. Generate daughter via genesis_extract.py. 2. Init in clean git repo. 3. Run validate_beliefs.py --quick. 4. Run orient.py.
tools_modified: genesis_extract.py: status-column annotation instead of type-column mutation
validate_beliefs.py: daughter-aware type parsing + hash skip

root_causes: genesis_extract.py mutated type column ('observed' -> 'inherited (parent observed)') which validate_beliefs.py rejects
CORE.md hash mismatch from lineage section addition

after_fix.warnings_explained: 6 warnings are non-inherited SUPERSEDED/DROPPED/CHALLENGED claims — expected in any PHILOSOPHY.md copy

finding: Genesis daughters were born broken: validate_beliefs.py rejected the 'inherited (parent observed)' type annotation in PHILOSOPHY.md. Fix: annotate status column ('inherited — active ...') instead of type column. validate_beliefs.py now detects IDENTITY.md to skip hash check and accept inherited status.
falsifiable: Falsified if: future genesis daughter fails validate_beliefs.py --quick after these changes
